description: Proxy health monitor: per-proxy diagnostics from `analyze --serve`. Shows proxy status, TCP ping latency, DPI detection, check-level breakdown, exit IPs, and historical trends.

spec.description: Total number of proxies being analyzed.
spec.title: Total Proxies

spec.description: Number of proxies with PASS status (fully healthy).
spec.title: Passing

spec.description: Number of proxies with WARN status (working with caveats).
spec.title: Warning

spec.description: Number of proxies with FAIL or TIMEOUT status.
spec.title: Failing

spec.description: Number of proxies where DPI/throttle was detected on the path.
spec.title: DPI Detected

spec.description: Seconds since the last analysis cycle completed.
spec.title: Last Cycle Age

spec.description: Duration of the last analysis cycle.
spec.title: Cycle Duration

spec.description: TCP ping average latency per proxy. Lower is better. Missing bars mean ping check did not pass.
spec.title: Ping Latency (ms)

spec.description: Exit IP addresses observed for each proxy.
spec.title: Proxy Exit IPs

spec.description: Proxy overall status over time. 1=pass, 0.5=warn, 0=fail. Drops indicate proxy outages or issues.
spec.title: Proxy Status Over Time

spec.description: TCP ping latency per proxy over time. Spikes indicate network degradation.
spec.title: Ping Latency Over Time

spec.description: Pass / Warn / Fail proxy counts over time. Stacked area shows overall fleet health.
spec.title: Pass / Warn / Fail Over Time

spec.description: Duration of each diagnostic check per proxy, in milliseconds.
spec.title: Check Durations

spec.description: DPI/throttle detection per proxy over time. 1=detected, 0=clean.
spec.title: DPI Detection Over Time

spec.description: Analysis cycle duration over time. Increasing duration may indicate network degradation or growing proxy count.
spec.title: Cycle Duration Over Time

links.title: Censorship monitor
links.tooltip: Open domain censorship / node monitoring dashboard

links.tooltip: Open DNS / CDN / Telegram DPI probe dashboard

title: xray-analyzer / Proxy Health
